item.title: The Events That Drew Prince Andrew Into Epstein's Orbit
item.description: Prince Andrew, Duke of York faced intense scrutiny over his longtime association with convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. Public attention intensified after allegations made by Virginia Giuffre, a widely criticized BBC interview, and a civil lawsuit that was ultimately settled without an admission of liability. The controversy led Prince Andrew to step back from public royal duties and remains one of the British monarchy's biggest modern scandals.

media:content.media:title: The Events That Drew Prince Andrew Into Epstein's Orbit
media:content.media:description: Prince Andrew, Duke of York faced intense scrutiny over his longtime association with convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. Public attention intensified after allegations made by Virginia Giuffre, a widely criticized BBC interview, and a civil lawsuit that was ultimately settled without an admission of liability. The controversy led Prince Andrew to step back from public royal duties and remains one of the British monarchy's biggest modern scandals.

item.title: How The Fukushima Meltdown Changed Nuclear Safety
item.description: In March 2011, a massive earthquake and tsunami triggered the disaster at Fukushima Daiichi Nuclear Power Plant, causing reactor meltdowns, hydrogen explosions, and widespread evacuations. It became the most severe nuclear accident since Chernobyl, prompting major changes to nuclear safety standards and emergency preparedness around the world.

media:content.media:title: How The Fukushima Meltdown Changed Nuclear Safety
media:content.media:description: In March 2011, a massive earthquake and tsunami triggered the disaster at Fukushima Daiichi Nuclear Power Plant, causing reactor meltdowns, hydrogen explosions, and widespread evacuations. It became the most severe nuclear accident since Chernobyl, prompting major changes to nuclear safety standards and emergency preparedness around the world.

item.title: The Murder That Shocked Japan
item.description: In 2007, Lindsay Hawker, a British English teacher living in Tokyo, was murdered after meeting a man who had persistently followed her. Her killer evaded capture for more than two years before being arrested and later convicted in Japan. The case received widespread international attention and remains one of Japan's most well-known criminal investigations.

media:content.media:title: The Murder That Shocked Japan
media:content.media:description: In 2007, Lindsay Hawker, a British English teacher living in Tokyo, was murdered after meeting a man who had persistently followed her. Her killer evaded capture for more than two years before being arrested and later convicted in Japan. The case received widespread international attention and remains one of Japan's most well-known criminal investigations.

item.title: The Millionaire Who Vanished After His Wife's Murder
item.description: Peter Chadwick was charged with murdering his wife, Quee Choo Chadwick, in California in 2012. After posting a $1 million bond, he disappeared and spent nearly four years as a fugitive before being captured in Mexico. His eventual conviction brought an end to one of the FBI's most high-profile fugitive investigations.

media:content.media:title: The Millionaire Who Vanished After His Wife's Murder
media:content.media:description: Peter Chadwick was charged with murdering his wife, Quee Choo Chadwick, in California in 2012. After posting a $1 million bond, he disappeared and spent nearly four years as a fugitive before being captured in Mexico. His eventual conviction brought an end to one of the FBI's most high-profile fugitive investigations.

item.title: How The Carter Hart Consent Video Became Key Evidence
item.description: The criminal case involving Carter Hart and several former members of Canada's 2018 World Junior hockey team drew widespread attention after a cellphone video became a significant piece of evidence. The proceedings examined issues of consent, witness testimony, and digital evidence as the court considered the allegations and the defendants' responses.

media:content.media:title: How The Carter Hart Consent Video Became Key Evidence
media:content.media:description: The criminal case involving Carter Hart and several former members of Canada's 2018 World Junior hockey team drew widespread attention after a cellphone video became a significant piece of evidence. The proceedings examined issues of consent, witness testimony, and digital evidence as the court considered the allegations and the defendants' responses.
